purpose: Longitudinal study on patient flow optimization in emergency departments to reduce wait times and improve resource allocation.
Retrospective analysis of COVID-19 vaccination effectiveness across age groups to inform booster campaign strategy.
Training a deep-learning model for automated chest X-ray triage to support radiologist workflow in high-volume settings.
Exploratory genome-wide association study on rare metabolic disorders for a master thesis project.
Development of improved signal detection algorithms for pharmacovigilance using disproportionality analysis methods.
Benchmarking a proprietary stroke outcome prediction model against real-world registry data for regulatory submission.
